flashcards.definition: 'Master gland'; anterior lobe produces GH, TSH, ACTH, FSH, LH, prolactin; posterior stores ADH, oxytocin.
Produces T3/T4 (regulate metabolism) and calcitonin (lowers blood calcium).
Cortex: cortisol, aldosterone. Medulla: epinephrine, norepinephrine.
β-cells secrete insulin (↓glucose); α-cells secrete glucagon (↑glucose).
Four small glands; secrete PTH which raises blood calcium levels.
